svg.title: bert & erne — full brush lockup (V5)
svg.desc: V5 dark-knockout brush lockup from round 10. Cream BERT & ERNE wordmark with court-yellow ampersand, Anton tagline beneath. Outlined paths — no font dependency. Transparent background so the same asset works on any dark surface. Source fonts: Permanent Marker (Google Fonts) — wordmark Anton (Google Fonts) — tagline Colors: cream #fafaf7 — wordmark + tagline yellow #f3d111 — ampersand
